sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93885" key="shsamoturopagh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σησᾰμο-τῡροπᾰγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n93885.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compounded of sesame and cheese</tr_>; or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σησᾰμο-ρῡτο-πᾰγής</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compounded of sesame and rue</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:3:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
